name: p-image-edit
description: A sub 1 second 0.01$ multi-image editing model built for production use cases. For image generation, check out p-image here: https://replicate.com/prunaai/p-image

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image. `match_input_image` will match the aspect ratio of the first image.
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker

images.description: Images to use as a reference. For editing task, provide the main image as the first image.
images.title: Images

prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation. Make sure to describe your edit task clearly. You can refer to the images as 'image 1' and 'image 2' and so on.
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.
seed.title: Seed

turbo.description: If turned on, the model will run faster with additional optimizations. For complicated tasks, it is recommended to turn this off.
turbo.title: Turbo
